name: Drop Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
Preparation Time: 0:15
Combine the flour, baking powder, and salt. Cut in the shortening with a pastry blender until the mixture resembles coarse meal.
Add milk, stirring until dry ingredients are moistened. Drop dough by heaping tablespoonfuls onto a lightly greased baking sheet. Bake at 425 degrees for 12 minutes or until lightly browned. Yield: 1 dozen.
